pages.text:
РЕПУБЛИКА СЕВЕРНА МАКЕДОНИЛА

МИНИСТЕРСТВО ЗА НАДВОРЕШНИ РАБОТИ

REPUBLIC OF NORTH MACEDONIA

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

Министер / Minister

Skopje, 26.05.2023

The Government of the Republic of North Macedonia declares that it adheres to the Convention relating to the International Exhibitions signed in Paris on 22

November 1928, modified by the Protocol of 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972 and amended on 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, in accordance with the provisions of

Article 3 of the Protocol, and that will perform in good faith all obligations under the

Convention and the Protocol.

In witness whereof, I have signed this instrument.

Bujar ÓSMANI // дис

COURRIER ARRIVEE

26 MAI 2023

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE
